title: poa bajaensis
intro: Poa bajaensis, also known as Baja blue grass, is a species of grass native to the Baja California Peninsula in Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Poa bajaensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
